name: agent-toast
description: Cross-platform desktop notification (Windows/macOS/Linux) when Claude Code finishes a turn. Windows path is ThreatLocker-safe (inline PowerShell). Configurable agent name, icon, optional sound.

agent_name.title: Agent name
agent_name.description: Toast title shown on every notification. Example: "Astro Agent", "Khanh Bot".

session_label.title: Session label (optional)
session_label.description: Short label to identify this window when running multiple agents at once. Example: "frontend", "api", "infra". Replaces the agent name in the notification title. Leave blank to use the agent name.

icon_path.title: Custom icon (PNG only)
icon_path.description: Absolute path to a .png file. Both styles work: Windows C:\\Users\\you\\bot.png or WSL /mnt/c/Users/you/bot.png. Leave blank to use the bundled astronaut.

beep_enabled.title: Play beep after toast?
beep_enabled.description: Type "yes" to also play an 800Hz beep through the Windows speaker. Type "no" (default) for silent toast only.
